# Wordspace Next

> Wordspace Next is a local desktop editor for HTML documents. Open a
> .html file, edit it like a normal document — headings, lists, tables,
> images — and it saves straight back to clean HTML. It runs entirely on
> your own machine: no cloud, no account.

## What it is

Wordspace Next turns plain .html files into something you can edit like a
document. Content you don't touch — tables, images, embedded media — is
preserved exactly as it was, so the file stays valid HTML you can open
anywhere.

It is a native desktop app for macOS and Windows, free to download, and it
updates itself automatically (builds are signed and notarized).

## Download

- macOS (Apple Silicon): https://wordspace.ai/downloads/mac
- Windows (x64 installer): https://wordspace.ai/downloads/win

Both links always point at the latest signed build, published through the
app's public GitHub releases, so they stay stable across versions.

## Links

- Product site: https://wordspace.ai
- Source & releases: https://github.com/jizhoutang10thglobal/wordspace-next
- Release notes: https://github.com/jizhoutang10thglobal/wordspace-next/releases
